# Site

## MCP Access
- MCP endpoint: https://docs.webhouse.app/mcp
- Protocol: Model Context Protocol (SSE transport)
- Auth: none required
- Docs: https://docs.webhouse.app/mcp/info

## Collections
- docs: Documentation (51 published documents)
- changelog: Changelog (13 published documents)
- snippets: Shared Snippets (15 published documents)
